text.zh: 1997 年，塞普·霍赫赖特和于尔根·施密德胡伯提出 LSTM，以门控记忆单元改善循环网络中的长时依赖学习。
text.en: In 1997, Sepp Hochreiter and Juergen Schmidhuber introduced LSTM, using gated memory cells to improve long-range learning in recurrent networks.

text.zh: 原始 LSTM 使用记忆单元、输入门和输出门维持较稳定的误差信号；遗忘门由后续版本加入，使模型能够主动清除状态。
text.en: The original LSTM used memory cells with input and output gates to preserve learning signals; a forget gate was introduced in a later version so the model could actively clear state.
